key_rules.properties:
display:inline-block;font-weight:400;text-align:center;white-space:normal;vertical-align:middle;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;user-select:none;border:1px solid transparent;line-height:1.5;border-radius:0.25rem;transition:color 0.15s ease-in-out, background-color 0.15s ease-in-out,
	border-color 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out;margin:20px auto;font-size:20px;font-family:Helvetica, serif;padding:10px 25px 10px 25px;
